case_title: CRISMAN NICOLETTE AUSSCHNITT VS ZELTZER EUGENE JUVAL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZELTZER EUGENE JUVAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRISMAN NICOLETTE AUSSCHNITT AS TO DEFENDANT ZELTZER EUGENE JUVAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRISMAN NICOLETTE AUSSCHNITT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZELTZER EUGENE JUVAL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZELTZER EUGENE JUVAL
